inputs.label: Cement Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of cement in the concrete batch, typically in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of cement in the concrete batch, typically in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Beton partisindeki çimento kütlesi, tipik olarak kilogram cinsinden.

inputs.label: Water Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of water in the batch, including water in admixtures if applicable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of water in the batch, including water in admixtures if applicable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Partideki su kütlesi, varsa katkılardaki su dahil.

inputs.label: Fine Aggregate (Sand) Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of fine aggregate (sand) in the batch.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of fine aggregate (sand) in the batch.

inputs.label: Coarse Aggregate Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of coarse aggregate (gravel or crushed stone) in the batch.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of coarse aggregate (gravel or crushed stone) in the batch.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Partideki iri agrega (çakıl veya kırma taş) kütlesi.

inputs.label: Admixture Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of chemical admixtures added (if any), in kilograms. Convert liquid volume to mass using density if applicable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of chemical admixtures added (if any), in kilograms. Convert liquid volume to mass using density if applicable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eklenen kimyasal katkıların kütlesi (varsa), kilogram cinsinden. Sıvı hacmi, yoğunluk kullanılarak kütleye dönüştürülür.

inputs.label: Fresh Concrete Density
inputs.businessContext: Measured unit weight (density) of the fresh concrete. Typical range: 2200–2500 kg/m³.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured unit weight (density) of the fresh concrete. Typical range: 2200–2500 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Taze betonun ölçülen birim ağırlığı (yoğunluğu). Tipik aralık: 2200–2500 kg/m³.

inputs.label: Cement Bag Mass
inputs.businessContext: Standard mass of one cement bag (e.g., 50 kg). Used to calculate yield per bag.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard mass of one cement bag (e.g., 50 kg). Used to calculate yield per bag.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir çimento torbasının standart kütlesi (ör. 50 kg). Torba başına verimi hesaplamak için kullanılır.

formulas.yieldPerBag: ((cementMass + waterMass + fineAggregateMass + coarseAggregateMass + admixtureMass) / freshDensity) / (cementMass / bagMass)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
